'''Nofre Ecls''' was an [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] who ran [[Nofre Repair Bay]] at [[Gelgelar Free Port/Legends|Gelgelar Free Port]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gelgelar/Legends|Gelgelar]]. She was the sister of [[Loro Ecls]] who managed Gelgelar Free Port. She was affiliated with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], but her brother did not share her sympathies, or if he did he kept it to himself.

==Biography==
Ecls was summoned to [[Drop Point: Gelgelar]] by [[Arik Stijhl]] to assist on getting ''[[The Maker (YT-1300 light freighter)|The Maker]]'' up and running again. She was working with [[T'Charek Haathi]] to get the power grid working but told her that she would need to rewire the whole system. Haathi rejected the recommendation and suggested that they just hotwire the main [[Engine/Legends|engine]] to the [[Power core/Legends|power core]]. The Sullustan told her that it would be dangerous and could destroy the ship if there was a power spike. Haathi ordered Ecls to proceed with the repair.<ref name="AJ14" />
{{Char-stub}}
